api-reference.description: This document provides a technical reference for three core GitHub API endpoints. All requests should use the base URL:

index.title: Overview
index.description: This documentation hub provides high-quality technical guides, API references, and step-by-step tutorials designed to help you build modern, type-safe web applications.

tutorial/tutorial.title: Building a Controlled Form
tutorial/tutorial.description: Managing form state in React often involves writing repetitive boilerplate code and handling complex, unnecessary re-renders. This tutorial teaches you how to spin up a new React project and build a performant, type-safe form using React Hook Form and Zod for schema validation.
